name: v2.7.3
body:
## v2.7.3

### What's New

- **Splash screen overhaul** — removed system splash (no more double splash), custom Compose SplashScreen with premium entrance animation (scale 0.7→1.0, alpha 0→1, 600ms EaseOutCubic), theme-aware background via MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background, logo uses ContentScale.Fit with 32dp padding (no cropping)
- **Video player — complete glassmorphism redesign** — all player controls use translucent glass surfaces with thin border highlights; Portrait controls: 3 animated sections (floating top bar, center playback with scale+fade, bottom seek dock with horizontally scrollable action strip); Landscape controls: 5 independently animated floating docks (top bar, left dock for Speed/A-Sync/Timer, center playback, right dock for Audio/Lock/Rotate, bottom seek dock)
- **New glass components** — GlassCard, GlassButton (with spring press animation), GlassChip, GlassSeekBarRow
- **Top bar unified** — single glass card with adaptive spacing, 42dp touch targets, and a More button
- **Portrait action dock** — redesigned as horizontally scrollable single-row floating strip, never wraps
- **Fixed unwanted action bar** after removing system splash
- **Version code bumped from 414 → 415
